item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: prevent stale paused sessions and duplicate tabs from session ID mismatch - fix: prevent large structured dashboards from rendering as decorative banners (TSK-001) - chore: update postChangeActions to explicitly quit/relaunch Debug app around builds - fix: restore tool call details on macOS session resume via Supabase fallback (TSK-004, TSK-005) - feat: improve dashboard empty sessions state and remove completed PRD column - chore: remove file-based PRD artifacts — Supabase is single source of truth (US-013) - feat: rewrite iOS PRD tab with three-tab detail view and Supabase-powered stories (US-012) - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: prevent large structured dashboards from rendering as decorative banners (TSK-001) - chore: update postChangeActions to explicitly quit/relaunch Debug app around builds - fix: restore tool call details on macOS session resume via Supabase fallback (TSK-004, TSK-005) - feat: improve dashboard empty sessions state and remove completed PRD column - chore: remove file-based PRD artifacts — Supabase is single source of truth (US-013) - feat: rewrite iOS PRD tab with three-tab detail view and Supabase-powered stories (US-012) - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: restore tool call details on macOS session resume via Supabase fallback (TSK-004, TSK-005) - feat: improve dashboard empty sessions state and remove completed PRD column - chore: remove file-based PRD artifacts — Supabase is single source of truth (US-013) - feat: rewrite iOS PRD tab with three-tab detail view and Supabase-powered stories (US-012) - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006) - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: improve dashboard empty sessions state and remove completed PRD column - chore: remove file-based PRD artifacts — Supabase is single source of truth (US-013) - feat: rewrite iOS PRD tab with three-tab detail view and Supabase-powered stories (US-012) - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006) - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: rewrite iOS PRD tab with three-tab detail view and Supabase-powered stories (US-012) - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006) - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003) - feat: create prd_stories table with RLS, triggers, indexes, Realtime (US-002) - feat: expand prds table with content, notes, phases, stories columns (US-001)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: add HelmEventRouter for Realtime event dispatch to PRDStore (US-011) - feat: add per-story PRD detail view with three tabs and enhanced PRD cards (US-010) - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006) - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003) - feat: create prd_stories table with RLS, triggers, indexes, Realtime (US-002) - feat: expand prds table with content, notes, phases, stories columns (US-001) - fix: render tool call cards on assistant messages in macOS chat view

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: add PRDStore (Supabase-only) replacing PRDSyncManager consumers (US-009) - feat: add PRD event tools to helm-bridge plugin (US-006) - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003) - feat: create prd_stories table with RLS, triggers, indexes, Realtime (US-002) - feat: expand prds table with content, notes, phases, stories columns (US-001) - fix: render tool call cards on assistant messages in macOS chat view - fix: resolve 9 iOS note editing bugs — dark mode colors, heading detection, tap targets, camera, photos, duplicate date, paragraph layout - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: add helm-bridge plugin with generic event bus and helm_events table (US-005) - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003) - feat: create prd_stories table with RLS, triggers, indexes, Realtime (US-002) - feat: expand prds table with content, notes, phases, stories columns (US-001) - fix: render tool call cards on assistant messages in macOS chat view - fix: resolve 9 iOS note editing bugs — dark mode colors, heading detection, tap targets, camera, photos, duplicate date, paragraph layout - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: update Swift models for expanded prds schema, add PRDStoryModels (US-004) - feat: add one-time PRD data migration from files to Supabase (US-003) - feat: create prd_stories table with RLS, triggers, indexes, Realtime (US-002) - feat: expand prds table with content, notes, phases, stories columns (US-001) - fix: render tool call cards on assistant messages in macOS chat view - fix: resolve 9 iOS note editing bugs — dark mode colors, heading detection, tap targets, camera, photos, duplicate date, paragraph layout - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: render tool call cards on assistant messages in macOS chat view - fix: resolve 9 iOS note editing bugs — dark mode colors, heading detection, tap targets, camera, photos, duplicate date, paragraph layout - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer - fix: conflict alert triggering on own saves in iOS note editor - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: resolve 9 iOS note editing bugs — dark mode colors, heading detection, tap targets, camera, photos, duplicate date, paragraph layout - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer - fix: conflict alert triggering on own saves in iOS note editor - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011) - feat: iOS notes list view with repo picker, grouped notes, tab/sidebar integration (US-010)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: constrain NSTextView editor width to prevent overflow in notes panel - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer - fix: conflict alert triggering on own saves in iOS note editor - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011) - feat: iOS notes list view with repo picker, grouped notes, tab/sidebar integration (US-010) - feat: notes list view macOS panel with grouped list and side-by-side editor (US-009)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: constrain note editor width to scroll view bounds on macOS - fix: use explicit TextKit 1 stack for HelmNoteTextView to fix empty editor - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer - fix: conflict alert triggering on own saves in iOS note editor - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011) - feat: iOS notes list view with repo picker, grouped notes, tab/sidebar integration (US-010) - feat: notes list view macOS panel with grouped list and side-by-side editor (US-009) - feat: file attachment pill display for macOS and iOS (US-008)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: resolve crash in HelmNoteTextView init by using designated initializer - fix: conflict alert triggering on own saves in iOS note editor - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011) - feat: iOS notes list view with repo picker, grouped notes, tab/sidebar integration (US-010) - feat: notes list view macOS panel with grouped list and side-by-side editor (US-009) - feat: file attachment pill display for macOS and iOS (US-008) - feat: add inline image support with camera, photo library, and file picker to iOS editor (US-007) - feat: add inline image support with drag-drop and file picker to macOS editor (US-006)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: iPad two-column notes layout (US-014) - feat: remove all scratchpad dead code (US-013) - feat: iOS note editor view with share, pin/delete, date stamp, auto-save, and conflict detection (US-011) - feat: iOS notes list view with repo picker, grouped notes, tab/sidebar integration (US-010) - feat: notes list view macOS panel with grouped list and side-by-side editor (US-009) - feat: file attachment pill display for macOS and iOS (US-008) - feat: add inline image support with camera, photo library, and file picker to iOS editor (US-007) - feat: add inline image support with drag-drop and file picker to macOS editor (US-006) - feat: add iOS rich text editor with inputAccessoryView toolbar and NoteBlock binding (US-005) - feat: add macOS rich text editor with formatting toolbar and NoteBlock binding (US-004)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: make device registration resilient to RLS/unique constraint issues - docs(prd): fix malformed prd-registry.json (helm-bridge-extensions entry was outside prds array) - fix: move background services to primary startup path after restoreSession - docs(prd): move prd-notes to ready - fix: wait for device registration before creating Supabase session - fix: abandon session in Supabase when closing tab with destroy branch - fix: backfill tabs missing Supabase sessions after device registration - fix: scope dashboard to current repo & treat stale sessions as paused - docs(prd): create draft notes - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: move background services to primary startup path after restoreSession - docs(prd): move prd-notes to ready - fix: wait for device registration before creating Supabase session - fix: abandon session in Supabase when closing tab with destroy branch - fix: backfill tabs missing Supabase sessions after device registration - fix: scope dashboard to current repo & treat stale sessions as paused - docs(prd): create draft notes - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: wait for device registration before creating Supabase session - fix: abandon session in Supabase when closing tab with destroy branch - fix: backfill tabs missing Supabase sessions after device registration - fix: scope dashboard to current repo & treat stale sessions as paused - docs(prd): create draft notes - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: abandon session in Supabase when closing tab with destroy branch - fix: backfill tabs missing Supabase sessions after device registration - fix: scope dashboard to current repo & treat stale sessions as paused - docs(prd): create draft notes - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: scope dashboard to current repo & treat stale sessions as paused - docs(prd): create draft notes - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): use xcconfig for manual signing to scope settings properly - fix(ci): use automatic signing without -allowProvisioningUpdates to prevent cert creation

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: filter dashboard sessions and PRDs to current project repo - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): use xcconfig for manual signing to scope settings properly - fix(ci): use automatic signing without -allowProvisioningUpdates to prevent cert creation - fix(ci): scope manual signing settings to iphoneos SDK to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): add DEVELOPMENT_TEAM for SPM dependency signing in manual mode

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: add desktop column to session rows showing which device each session is on - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): use xcconfig for manual signing to scope settings properly - fix(ci): use automatic signing without -allowProvisioningUpdates to prevent cert creation - fix(ci): scope manual signing settings to iphoneos SDK to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): add DEVELOPMENT_TEAM for SPM dependency signing in manual mode - fix(dashboard): restyle + New PRD button to match + Session style and move to far right

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: wire activeTabSessionIds into stats bar and sessions section for accurate Active/Paused grouping - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): use xcconfig for manual signing to scope settings properly - fix(ci): use automatic signing without -allowProvisioningUpdates to prevent cert creation - fix(ci): scope manual signing settings to iphoneos SDK to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): add DEVELOPMENT_TEAM for SPM dependency signing in manual mode - fix(dashboard): restyle + New PRD button to match + Session style and move to far right - fix(ci): switch TestFlight to manual signing with provisioning profile

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat(dashboard): split sessions into Active/Paused groups based on tab state - fix(ci): patch project.pbxproj at build time to scope manual signing to HelmIOS target only - fix(ci): use PROVISIONING_PROFILE UUID instead of SPECIFIER to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): use xcconfig for manual signing to scope settings properly - fix(ci): use automatic signing without -allowProvisioningUpdates to prevent cert creation - fix(ci): scope manual signing settings to iphoneos SDK to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): add DEVELOPMENT_TEAM for SPM dependency signing in manual mode - fix(dashboard): restyle + New PRD button to match + Session style and move to far right - fix(ci): switch TestFlight to manual signing with provisioning profile - fix(ci): remove -allowProvisioningUpdates from archive step to prevent certificate exhaustion

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix(ci): scope manual signing settings to iphoneos SDK to avoid SPM conflicts - fix(ci): add DEVELOPMENT_TEAM for SPM dependency signing in manual mode - fix(dashboard): restyle + New PRD button to match + Session style and move to far right - fix(ci): switch TestFlight to manual signing with provisioning profile - fix(ci): remove -allowProvisioningUpdates from archive step to prevent certificate exhaustion - chore: mark prd-ios-sessions-polish as completed in registry (14/14 stories) - feat(ios): add ScratchpadListView with repo list and scratchpad indicators (US-014) - feat(ios): add session search with client-side filtering (US-013) - feat(ios): remove dead code — DesktopsTab, DesktopDetailView, ReposTab, RepoDetailView, old SessionDetailView and related components (US-012) - feat(ios): US-011 — Session detail redesign with chat-first and info menu

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix(dashboard): restyle + New PRD button to match + Session style and move to far right - fix(ci): switch TestFlight to manual signing with provisioning profile - fix(ci): remove -allowProvisioningUpdates from archive step to prevent certificate exhaustion - chore: mark prd-ios-sessions-polish as completed in registry (14/14 stories) - feat(ios): add ScratchpadListView with repo list and scratchpad indicators (US-014) - feat(ios): add session search with client-side filtering (US-013) - feat(ios): remove dead code — DesktopsTab, DesktopDetailView, ReposTab, RepoDetailView, old SessionDetailView and related components (US-012) - feat(ios): US-011 — Session detail redesign with chat-first and info menu - feat: unify all session navigation to SessionChatView (US-010) - feat: create UnifiedSessionRowView replacing all 4 session row variants (US-009)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat(ios): add ScratchpadListView with repo list and scratchpad indicators (US-014) - feat(ios): add session search with client-side filtering (US-013) - feat(ios): remove dead code — DesktopsTab, DesktopDetailView, ReposTab, RepoDetailView, old SessionDetailView and related components (US-012) - feat(ios): US-011 — Session detail redesign with chat-first and info menu - feat: unify all session navigation to SessionChatView (US-010) - feat: create UnifiedSessionRowView replacing all 4 session row variants (US-009) - feat: sub-group sessions by type within each group with lightweight sub-headers (US-008) - feat: collapsible groups showing first 2 sessions with expand/collapse (US-007) - feat: add By Desktop, By Helm User, By Organization grouping modes with orgName join (US-006) - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat(ios): remove dead code — DesktopsTab, DesktopDetailView, ReposTab, RepoDetailView, old SessionDetailView and related components (US-012) - feat(ios): US-011 — Session detail redesign with chat-first and info menu - feat: unify all session navigation to SessionChatView (US-010) - feat: create UnifiedSessionRowView replacing all 4 session row variants (US-009) - feat: sub-group sessions by type within each group with lightweight sub-headers (US-008) - feat: collapsible groups showing first 2 sessions with expand/collapse (US-007) - feat: add By Desktop, By Helm User, By Organization grouping modes with orgName join (US-006) - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding - feat: replace filter dropdown with Active/Paused/Team segmented toggle, remove org picker (US-005) - feat: reorder new session flow to Desktop → Repo → Type (US-004)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: create UnifiedSessionRowView replacing all 4 session row variants (US-009) - feat: sub-group sessions by type within each group with lightweight sub-headers (US-008) - feat: collapsible groups showing first 2 sessions with expand/collapse (US-007) - feat: add By Desktop, By Helm User, By Organization grouping modes with orgName join (US-006) - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding - feat: replace filter dropdown with Active/Paused/Team segmented toggle, remove org picker (US-005) - feat: reorder new session flow to Desktop → Repo → Type (US-004) - feat: three-tab navigation (Sessions + Scratchpad + PRDs) with new session button (US-003) - feat: sync session title from macOS to Supabase on SSE event (US-002) - fix: decode server diff format (file/before/after) in inspector Diff tab

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: sub-group sessions by type within each group with lightweight sub-headers (US-008) - feat: collapsible groups showing first 2 sessions with expand/collapse (US-007) - feat: add By Desktop, By Helm User, By Organization grouping modes with orgName join (US-006) - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding - feat: replace filter dropdown with Active/Paused/Team segmented toggle, remove org picker (US-005) - feat: reorder new session flow to Desktop → Repo → Type (US-004) - feat: three-tab navigation (Sessions + Scratchpad + PRDs) with new session button (US-003) - feat: sync session title from macOS to Supabase on SSE event (US-002) - fix: decode server diff format (file/before/after) in inspector Diff tab - feat: add session_name column to sessions table and update Swift models (US-001)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: add By Desktop, By Helm User, By Organization grouping modes with orgName join (US-006) - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding - feat: replace filter dropdown with Active/Paused/Team segmented toggle, remove org picker (US-005) - feat: reorder new session flow to Desktop → Repo → Type (US-004) - feat: three-tab navigation (Sessions + Scratchpad + PRDs) with new session button (US-003) - feat: sync session title from macOS to Supabase on SSE event (US-002) - fix: decode server diff format (file/before/after) in inspector Diff tab - feat: add session_name column to sessions table and update Swift models (US-001) - feat: extract shared diff components, add FileEditCardBody, upgrade FileWriteCardBody, add DiffStore debug logging - docs(prd): add US-014 Scratchpad Tab, update US-003 to 3-tab nav

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: improve inspector UI and harden message REST decoding - feat: replace filter dropdown with Active/Paused/Team segmented toggle, remove org picker (US-005) - feat: reorder new session flow to Desktop → Repo → Type (US-004) - feat: three-tab navigation (Sessions + Scratchpad + PRDs) with new session button (US-003) - feat: sync session title from macOS to Supabase on SSE event (US-002) - fix: decode server diff format (file/before/after) in inspector Diff tab - feat: add session_name column to sessions table and update Swift models (US-001) - feat: extract shared diff components, add FileEditCardBody, upgrade FileWriteCardBody, add DiffStore debug logging - docs(prd): add US-014 Scratchpad Tab, update US-003 to 3-tab nav - fix: full-width user messages, stop button in agent bar, softer bold text

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: three-tab navigation (Sessions + Scratchpad + PRDs) with new session button (US-003) - feat: sync session title from macOS to Supabase on SSE event (US-002) - fix: decode server diff format (file/before/after) in inspector Diff tab - feat: add session_name column to sessions table and update Swift models (US-001) - feat: extract shared diff components, add FileEditCardBody, upgrade FileWriteCardBody, add DiffStore debug logging - docs(prd): add US-014 Scratchpad Tab, update US-003 to 3-tab nav - fix: full-width user messages, stop button in agent bar, softer bold text - fix: auto-scroll not reaching bottom at end of assistant responses - fix: session data persistence, tool card UX, and markdown rendering - fix: constrain progress bar to compact 120pt container with 40pt bounce indicator (TSK-003)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: extract shared diff components, add FileEditCardBody, upgrade FileWriteCardBody, add DiffStore debug logging - docs(prd): add US-014 Scratchpad Tab, update US-003 to 3-tab nav - fix: full-width user messages, stop button in agent bar, softer bold text - fix: auto-scroll not reaching bottom at end of assistant responses - fix: session data persistence, tool card UX, and markdown rendering - fix: constrain progress bar to compact 120pt container with 40pt bounce indicator (TSK-003) - docs(prd): move ios-sessions-polish to ready - fix: progress bar width/stall, token count inflation, todo icon animation persistence (TSK-003, TSK-004) - fix: replace rainbow progress bar with single-color bounce indicator, move status row below input (TSK-002) - fix: persist message input draft text across dashboard navigation (TSK-001)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: full-width user messages, stop button in agent bar, softer bold text - fix: auto-scroll not reaching bottom at end of assistant responses - fix: session data persistence, tool card UX, and markdown rendering - fix: constrain progress bar to compact 120pt container with 40pt bounce indicator (TSK-003) - docs(prd): move ios-sessions-polish to ready - fix: progress bar width/stall, token count inflation, todo icon animation persistence (TSK-003, TSK-004) - fix: replace rainbow progress bar with single-color bounce indicator, move status row below input (TSK-002) - fix: persist message input draft text across dashboard navigation (TSK-001) - feat: question/option styling + fix inline code pill contrast - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: session data persistence, tool card UX, and markdown rendering - fix: constrain progress bar to compact 120pt container with 40pt bounce indicator (TSK-003) - docs(prd): move ios-sessions-polish to ready - fix: progress bar width/stall, token count inflation, todo icon animation persistence (TSK-003, TSK-004) - fix: replace rainbow progress bar with single-color bounce indicator, move status row below input (TSK-002) - fix: persist message input draft text across dashboard navigation (TSK-001) - feat: question/option styling + fix inline code pill contrast - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: constrain progress bar to compact 120pt container with 40pt bounce indicator (TSK-003) - docs(prd): move ios-sessions-polish to ready - fix: progress bar width/stall, token count inflation, todo icon animation persistence (TSK-003, TSK-004) - fix: replace rainbow progress bar with single-color bounce indicator, move status row below input (TSK-002) - fix: persist message input draft text across dashboard navigation (TSK-001) - feat: question/option styling + fix inline code pill contrast - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: replace rainbow progress bar with single-color bounce indicator, move status row below input (TSK-002) - fix: persist message input draft text across dashboard navigation (TSK-001) - feat: question/option styling + fix inline code pill contrast - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: question/option styling + fix inline code pill contrast - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003) - feat: default to group-by-project, persist preference, sort by status (US-002) - feat: sessions as primary tab, repos tab removed (US-001)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: rich markdown rendering — brighter text, code block contrast, inline code color variety - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003) - feat: default to group-by-project, persist preference, sort by status (US-002) - feat: sessions as primary tab, repos tab removed (US-001) - feat: redesign session categorization with in-tab/recent groups and add abandon session

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: break ChatView into isolated sub-views to eliminate scroll-triggered re-evaluation loop - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003) - feat: default to group-by-project, persist preference, sort by status (US-002) - feat: sessions as primary tab, repos tab removed (US-001) - feat: redesign session categorization with in-tab/recent groups and add abandon session - fix: align dashboard stats bar session count with sessions section

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - refactor: dashboard layout — dual-column scroll, compact session rows, PRD board styling - fix: throttle @Observable mutations to eliminate main thread lockup - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003) - feat: default to group-by-project, persist preference, sort by status (US-002) - feat: sessions as primary tab, repos tab removed (US-001) - feat: redesign session categorization with in-tab/recent groups and add abandon session - fix: align dashboard stats bar session count with sessions section - feat: filter model list to show only GitHub Copilot provider models

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - chore: mark prd-ios-session-first-nav as completed (4/4 stories) - feat: notification deep link to sessions tab (US-004) - feat: add unified new session sheet to Sessions tab (US-003) - feat: default to group-by-project, persist preference, sort by status (US-002) - feat: sessions as primary tab, repos tab removed (US-001) - feat: redesign session categorization with in-tab/recent groups and add abandon session - fix: align dashboard stats bar session count with sessions section - feat: filter model list to show only GitHub Copilot provider models - fix: simplify gear button to post notification without tab switch - refactor: extract reusable ModelSelectionPopover component into HelmUI

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - chore: mark prd-message-area-refinements as completed (13/13 stories) - feat: add centralized MarkdownStyleTokens with inline code background tint and enhanced heading/link/blockquote styling (US-013) - feat: add task delegation card with sub-agent activity display and live timer (US-012) - fix: keep attachment files on disk until tab close to prevent race condition (US-011) - feat: full-width user messages with shared markdown renderer and syntax highlighting (US-010) - feat: rename Signals to Signals and Actions with configure link (US-009) - feat: rename Tasks to Todos and make header always visible (US-008) - feat: wire up SSE token data to message metadata and show without context window (US-007) - feat: replace pulsing dot with animated colored block progress bar (US-006) - feat: simplify agent badge to plain text style (US-005)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: accordion split view, header layout rework, and UI polish - feat: restructure tab bar into 2-row layout with ProjectHeaderRow - docs(prd): move message-area-refinements to ready (13 stories, JSON + markdown) - fix: move .environment(splitViewManager) to ContentView.body level to fix crash on launch - docs(prd): add US-013 non-goals, design considerations, success metric; update registry to 13 stories - docs(prd): add US-013 enhanced narrative rendering, update intro/goals/scope/FRs/DoD for 13 stories - docs(prd): fix FR-2 to match US-001 native translucent overlay spec - docs(prd): update DoD, open questions, success metrics, registry for 12 stories - docs(prd): update FR-8–20, non-goals, design, and technical considerations for 12 stories - docs(prd): refine US-008–010, add new US-011 (race condition) and US-012 (task delegation)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - docs(prd): refine intro, goals, scope, US-001–003 with approved decisions - feat(SS-012): Command palette operates in focused pane context - feat(SS-011): Toolbar reflects focused pane in split mode - feat(SS-010): Persist split mode state per project across sessions - docs(prd): finalize prd-dashboard-command-center with 14 stories - feat(SS-009): Color-coded tab/pane matching in split mode - feat(SS-008): Tab reordering in split mode with drag-and-drop - feat(SS-007): New tabs automatically appear as panes in split mode - feat(SS-006): Tab close behavior in split mode with pane removal and focus shift - feat(SS-005): Focus indicator and pane activation in split mode

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix(FIX-028v2): restore left-alignment on message rows - fix(FIX-028v2): resolve infinite SwiftUI layout loop via concrete width passing - fix: disable Sparkle auto-update in Debug builds and isolate worktree paths between Debug/Release - fix: break infinite SwiftUI layout loop that caused 100% CPU hang during streaming (FIX-028) - fix: isolate Debug builds from Release to prevent port/PID/state collisions - ci: upgrade Xcode 16.2 → 26.2 to satisfy iOS 26 SDK requirement for TestFlight (ITMS-90725) - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix(FIX-028v2): resolve infinite SwiftUI layout loop via concrete width passing - fix: disable Sparkle auto-update in Debug builds and isolate worktree paths between Debug/Release - fix: break infinite SwiftUI layout loop that caused 100% CPU hang during streaming (FIX-028) - fix: isolate Debug builds from Release to prevent port/PID/state collisions - ci: upgrade Xcode 16.2 → 26.2 to satisfy iOS 26 SDK requirement for TestFlight (ITMS-90725) - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: disable Sparkle auto-update in Debug builds and isolate worktree paths between Debug/Release - fix: break infinite SwiftUI layout loop that caused 100% CPU hang during streaming (FIX-028) - fix: isolate Debug builds from Release to prevent port/PID/state collisions - ci: upgrade Xcode 16.2 → 26.2 to satisfy iOS 26 SDK requirement for TestFlight (ITMS-90725) - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005) - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: break infinite SwiftUI layout loop that caused 100% CPU hang during streaming (FIX-028) - fix: isolate Debug builds from Release to prevent port/PID/state collisions - ci: upgrade Xcode 16.2 → 26.2 to satisfy iOS 26 SDK requirement for TestFlight (ITMS-90725) - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005) - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - ci: upgrade Xcode 16.2 → 26.2 to satisfy iOS 26 SDK requirement for TestFlight (ITMS-90725) - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005) - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: redesign git status widget for worktree-centric model + hide push/pull for worktree sessions (TSK-006, TSK-007) - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005) - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: claimBranch now throws branchAlreadyClaimed instead of silently overwriting (TSK-004) - fix: add per-repo-path git operation serialization via actor (TSK-003) - fix: replace remote URL mutation with per-process credential injection (TSK-002) - fix: store token in WorktreeInfo so pauseSession and autoSave use fresh credentials (TSK-001, TSK-005) - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - feat: UI polish — Session Actions V3 redesign, todo dedup, Tasks header, rail icon fix, tab memory, localhost button - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: use legacy keychain and strip restricted entitlements for Developer ID builds - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: import Apple Development cert and preserve entitlements in CI - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - revert: restore CI workflow to build 16 state (fix AMFI launch failure) - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: strip aps-environment entitlement for Developer ID distribution - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: skip code signing during archive to avoid certificate quota error - fix: use expanded entitlements for CI re-signing (not raw plist) - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012) - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: preserve entitlements during CI re-signing and add session retry logic - feat: complete prd-beta-distribution — all 13 stories done ✅ - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012) - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI - fix: bypass exportArchive for Developer ID — extract and codesign app from archive directly - chore: add ExportOptions plists to CI path filters

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: handle unquoted Sparkle sign_update output in appcast generation (US-012) - revert: trigger release builds on staging push (staging is test environment) - feat: trigger release builds on main push instead of staging (US-012) - chore: bulk update PRD story statuses — 12/13 completed, US-012 in_progress - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012) - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI - fix: bypass exportArchive for Developer ID — extract and codesign app from archive directly - chore: add ExportOptions plists to CI path filters - fix: use manual signing for Developer ID export — cloud signing not available (US-012) - fix: install iOS platform on macOS 15 CI runner before archive (US-010)
